chapterBrief: Rosa的证词指向Vivian，但未开火的手枪让23:30枪响出现裂缝。
Rosa's testimony points to Vivian, but an unfired gun cracks the 23:30 gunshot story.
summaryContent: Vivian手中的枪没有开火，Rosa的指认被撬开；但23:30枪声仍无法反驳。Webb的委托为调查争取到72小时。
Vivian's gun had not fired, cracking Rosa's accusation, but the 23:30 gunshot still cannot be disproved. Webb's commission wins a 72-hour window.
newDoubtContent: 他提前雇佣Zack保护Vivian，像是在防备某个真正的凶手。
He hired Zack in advance to protect Vivian, as if he was guarding against the real killer.
chapterGoal: 23:30那声枪响，真来自Vivian手中的枪吗？
Did the 23:30 gunshot really come from Vivian's gun?

doubts.text: 23:30 的枪响真的是在 Webb 会客室发生的吗？

chapterBrief: Webb的委托把调查引向他的真实生意，照片、账本和古董交易露出勒索网络。
Webb's commission leads the investigation into his real business, where photos, ledgers, and antique trades expose an extortion network.
summaryContent: 照片、账本和假古董交易证明蓝月亮不只卖私酒；Webb经营勒索，Tommy只是前任执行人。
The photos, ledgers, and fake antique trades prove the Blue Moon sells more than bootleg liquor. Webb runs blackmail, and Tommy was only the former enforcer.
newDoubtContent: 勒索网络已经换手，Tommy不肯点名；Webb害怕的那个大人物仍藏在暗处。
The blackmail network has changed hands, and Tommy refuses to name the new enforcer. The big figure Webb feared remains hidden.
chapterGoal: Webb为何在死前匆忙立下那份遗嘱？
Why did Webb rush to make that will before he died?

doubts.text: 勒索照片上的人，和 Webb 办公室 VIP 合影里的是同一拨？
Webb 私账和 Tommy 酒吧账本差了 $11,000，这笔钱哪来的？
账本上“已售”的油画和花瓶，怎么还摆在歌舞厅里？
James 工资单上的薪水，撑得起他急需的那笔钱吗？

chapterBrief: 重新开放的会客室、侧巷玻璃和Rosa的生活线索，把假枪声和伪证串在一起。
The reopened reception room, alley glass, and clues from Rosa's life connect the false gunshot with false testimony.
summaryContent: 玻璃碎片和垃圾袋证明枪击早于23:20；Rosa是被威胁作伪证的人，23:30只是嫁祸的时间陷阱。
The glass shards and trash bags prove the shooting happened before 23:20. Rosa was forced into false testimony, and 23:30 was only a timing trap.
newDoubtContent: Rosa的谎言已经崩塌，可Vivian仍想背下罪名；她隐瞒的那晚经过，还没有说完。
Rosa's lie has collapsed, yet Vivian still wants to take the blame. She has not finished telling what happened that night.
chapterGoal: Rosa究竟在替谁掩盖那声枪响？
Who was Rosa protecting with that gunshot lie?

doubts.text: Webb 的死亡时间比 23:30 的枪响更早？
Rosa 是被胁迫作伪证的？
Webb 是否真的抛弃了 Vivian 沉迷 Rita？

chapterBrief: .45弹壳、“鲸鱼”的线索和Vivian的绝望认罪，说明真正的危险仍藏在酒吧里。
The .45 casing, Whale's trail, and Vivian's desperate confession show that the real danger is still inside the bar.
summaryContent: 弹壳口径与Vivian手枪不符，她不可能用那把枪杀死Webb；“鲸鱼”雇的人已经潜进蓝月亮。
The casing does not match Vivian's gun, so she could not have killed Webb with it. The person hired by Whale has already slipped into the Blue Moon.
newDoubtContent: Vivian不是凶手，Morrison却夺走弹壳强押她；真凶和保护伞同时浮出水面。
Vivian is not the killer, yet Morrison seizes the casing and drags her away. The real killer and the cover-up surface together.
chapterGoal: Vivian为什么宁愿认罪，也不肯说出真相？
Why would Vivian rather confess than tell the truth?

doubts.text: Whale 雇的人就在酒吧里？
分析过的 .45 警用弹壳是米勒集团特制——这种规格的凶器，谁能拿到？

chapterBrief: James的口音、Anna的处境和被隐藏的节目单，把真实枪声与真凶身份推到台前。
James's phrasing, Anna's situation, and the hidden program push the real gunshot and the killer's identity into view.
summaryContent: 鼓点掩盖真实枪声，James被坐实为真凶；缺钱、回信和写成T的J，把杀人动机与伪证全部闭合。
The drum climax masked the real gunshot, and James is confirmed as the killer. Money trouble, the reply letter, and J's written like T close both motive and false testimony.
newDoubtContent: James已经死了，Vivian仍被关押；Morrison为什么压案，他和“鲸鱼”之间究竟有什么交易？
James is dead, yet Vivian is still locked up. Why did Morrison bury the case, and what deal connects him to Whale?
chapterGoal: 真正的枪声到底发生在什么时刻？
When did the real gunshot actually happen?

doubts.text: James 就是 23:05 隔门吼 Vivian 的那个人？
Anna 怀孕又急需合法身份，James 是不是被钱和身份逼到绝路？
鼓点高潮掩盖了真实枪声？
Whale 和James有往来？

chapterBrief: Morrison家中的债务、借款记录和被藏起的弹壳，揭开他为何压住真相。
Morrison's debts, loan records, and hidden casing reveal why he buried the truth.
summaryContent: Morrison的赌债和借款记录证明他被“鲸鱼”钉住；凶器与弹壳闭合，Vivian终于洗清嫌疑。
Morrison's gambling debt and loan record prove Whale had him pinned. The weapon and casing match, and Vivian is finally cleared.
newDoubtTitle: Why is his mother a target?
newDoubtContent: Webb留下的录音指向南区清退计划，Margaret Brennan出现在第一批名单里。
Webb's recording points to the South Side clearance plan, and Margaret Brennan appears on the first target list.
chapterGoal: Morrison压下的，究竟是案件还是自己的罪证？
Was Morrison burying the case, or his own evidence?

doubts.text: Morrison 和 Whale 有金钱关系？
死者真的是 Margaret 吗？
Margaret 的婚戒去哪了？
Morrison 凭什么这么快定死者身份？

postExposeSegments.title: Morrison 承认旧仇结案
postExposeSegments.brief: Morrison 承认死者是 Frank Kowalski，透露黑手党匿名电话警告，并承诺有硬证据就签搜查令。

chapterGoal: 死者是谁——真的是母亲 Margaret 吗？
Who is the body — is it really Margaret?
chapterBrief: Morrison 迅速把死者认定为 Margaret，但婚戒、首饰盒和火场残留让身份结论出现裂缝。
Morrison quickly identifies the body as Margaret, but the missing ring, jewelry box, and fire-scene residue crack that conclusion.

doubts.text: Leonard 和 Vinnie 真的不认识？
这些钞票为什么互相是连号的？
Vinnie 的这笔新钱是哪儿来的？
Danny 在和 Leonard 谈什么？

postExposeSegments.title: Leonard 假善意给信封
postExposeSegments.brief: Leonard 承认雇佣 Vinnie 暴力催债，又假装帮忙递出签着自己名字的信封，引导 Zack 去市政厅申请搜查令。

chapterGoal: Margaret 为什么被打晕？她的昏迷和 Frank 的死亡有什么关系？
Why was Margaret knocked unconscious, and how is that tied to Frank's death?
chapterBrief: Frank 的债务线索把调查引向湖滨信托银行和 Silver Moon，连号钞票拼出 Leonard 与 Vinnie 的催债分成链。
Frank's debt trail points to Lakeshore Trust and Silver Moon, where sequential bills expose Leonard and Vinnie's debt-collection split.

doubts.text: Frank 真的签过这份贷款协议吗？
这真的是合法贷款吗？
Lakeshore Investment 和银行是什么关系？

postExposeSegments.title: 房产证与旧铁钥匙交付
postExposeSegments.brief: Moore 坦白贷款与房产证交易，房产证夹层掉出旧铁钥匙，Zack 取得后续调查入口。

chapterTitle: Mickey 登场与掠夺性贷款
Mickey Appears and the Predatory Loan
chapterGoal: Frank 的贷款到底是怎么一回事？湖滨信托银行对 Frank 做了什么？
What really happened with Frank's loan, and what did Lakeshore Trust do to him?
chapterBrief: Mickey 用律师身份打开银行搜查入口，档案、贷款计算和对账单揭露湖滨信托对 Frank 的掠夺性贷款。
Mickey's legal leverage opens the bank search; files, loan math, and statements reveal Lakeshore Trust's predatory loan against Frank.

doubts.text: Danny 是不是在拿叔叔换钱？
Margaret 的婚戒怎么会在 Danny 房间？
Frank 和 Lula 是真感情吗？

postExposeSegments.title: Danny 坦白目击与 Lula 补证
postExposeSegments.brief: 厕所指证结束后进入 Frank 家主屋会合，Danny 坦白当晚目击，Lula 补充 Frank 不会做饭和工资流向。
postExposeSegments.transitionLabel: Frank 家厕所 → Frank 家主屋会合

chapterTitle: 黄昏之爱与 Danny 指证
chapterGoal: Lula 是骗子还是真爱？Danny 的诬陷能否击破？
Is Lula a fraud or Frank's true love, and can Danny's accusation be broken?
chapterBrief: Lula 的长期恋情推翻“骗子”判断，Danny 的房产交易和戒指出现让他成为新的嫌疑人。
Lula's long relationship overturns the fraud story, while Danny's property deal and the ring make him the new suspect.
openingBrief: 圣心医院里，Margaret 仍在昏迷。Mickey 和 Emma 与 Zack 碰头，确认下一步要追查鞋坊地下室、Lula 与 Danny 的谎言；Emma 也提到医院受 Miller 资助。

doubts.text: 这把打火机的状态不对劲

postExposeSegments.title: Vinnie 抢话认罪
postExposeSegments.brief: Vinnie 在 Silver Moon 赌场主动认下纵火与杀人，形成误导性结案。

postExposeSegments.title: Foster 电话双消息
postExposeSegments.brief: Zack 和 Emma 到 Margaret 鞋坊门口电话亭联系 Foster，得知 Margaret 苏醒，以及 Frank 可能死于钝器击打。
postExposeSegments.transitionLabel: Silver Moon 赌场 → Margaret 鞋坊门口电话亭

chapterGoal: Frank 被杀那晚到底发生了什么？谁在案发现场，谁做了什么？
What really happened on the night Frank died, who was there, and what did each person do?
chapterBrief: 打火机、目击证词和赌场线索把纵火指向 Vinnie，他快速认罪却留下保护他人的违和感。
The lighter, witness accounts, and casino trail point to Vinnie, but his quick confession feels like he is protecting someone else.

doubts.text: Vinnie 真的杀了 Frank 吗？
鞋坊柜面缝隙里的眼镜碎片是谁的？
Leonard 的旧镜片去哪了？
鞋坊里发生过打斗？
Frank 当晚真的在睡觉吗？

postExposeSegments.title: Leonard 招供与 Vinnie 替罪揭穿
postExposeSegments.brief: Leonard 招供自己顺手抄起工作台上的铸铁鞋楦失手打死 Frank，并承认呼叫 Vinnie 移尸、纵火和顶罪。

postExposeSegments.title: Frank 墓地结局尾声
postExposeSegments.brief: Lula 在 Frank 墓前告别，Mickey 带来 Vinnie 自杀揽罪与 Moore 银行保下 Leonard 的坏消息，Zack 接下新案文件。
postExposeSegments.transitionLabel: Leonard 住所 → Frank 墓地

chapterGoal: Frank 是被人杀死的——但凶手是谁？L5 认罪的 Vinnie 真的能是凶手吗？
Frank was murdered — but by whom? Can Vinnie, who confessed in Loop 5, really be the killer?
chapterBrief: Margaret 苏醒后的目击、鞋坊废墟深搜和 Leonard 住所证据合拢，击穿 Vinnie 替罪后的真正凶手。
Margaret's awakened testimony, the ruined shoe shop, and Leonard's home evidence close the net around the real killer behind Vinnie's false confession.

doubts.text: Thomas 真的是自杀吗？——外墙有抓挠痕迹，尸体手部有伤痕和墙皮灰
案发现场的女性是谁？——楼顶有 6 码女鞋印

尸体手部的抓挠伤和墙皮灰——坠落时曾本能抓墙？
天台男性脚印的归属——属于 Thomas 自己？
天台角落的 Old Crow 药用威士忌空瓶从哪来？
Thomas 手部为何会有油痕？
11 月 20 日晚报天气栏的港口阵风——案发当晚的天气如何？

chapterGoal: Thomas 真的是自杀吗？
Thomas 真的是自杀吗？

Mickey 委托 Zack 调查 Thomas 坠楼案；外墙抓痕、手部伤痕和女性脚印把案件从自杀扳回可疑死亡。

Mickey 车内早报引案后切到 Zack 事务所正式委托。
